statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); dir=$(pwd); in_tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); out_tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); total=$((in_tokens + out_tokens)); if [ -n "$used_pct" ]; then printf '\033[01;32m%s@%s\033[00m:\033[01;34m%s\033[00m [Tokens: %s | Context: %.1f%% used]' "$user" "$host" "$dir" "$total" "$used_pct"; else printf '\033[01;32m%s@%s\033[00m:\033[01;34m%s\033[00m' "$user" "$host" "$dir"; fi
